Manager/Deputy Manager : Karnaphuli Group Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Karnaphuli Group Manager/Deputy Manager Application Deadline : 31 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 01 Age: 35 to 40 years Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 01 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 35 to 40 years Only Male Experience in vehicles, construction equipment, or E&M systems Familiarity with public procurement rules and tender documentation Strong understanding of public procurement processes Professional integrity and discretion in dealing with public institutions Proficient in Microsoft office tools Proficient in computer documentation, presentation and multi-tasking skills Excellent communication skills (Oral & Written) in both English and Bangle. Proficiency in English is a must.Strong attention to detail with perfect accuracy.8-10 years of experience in tender and institutional sales Must have smart attitude and be well presentable with good behavior.Energetic and dedicated about work Only Males are allowed to apply Responsibilities & Context Monitor and follow up on procurement plans, development programs, and upcoming tenders of government and public-sector entities Develop and maintain professional working relationships with key officials, stakeholders, and decision-makers of defense forces, government bodies and related agencies. Identify new business opportunities in defense procurement and government projects Liaise with concerned authorities to ensure clear understanding of project requirements and tender objectives Coordinate internally and with principals/manufacturers to align product capabilities with tender requirements Assist in technical and commercial inputs during tender preparation stages Support clarification meetings, per-bid discussions, and post-bid follow-ups Track policy updates, procurement guidelines, and sector developments relevant to public-sector projects- Any other duties as assigned by the management from time to time Compensation & Other Benefits Provident fund,Mobile bill,Weekly 2 holidays Festival Bonus: 2 As per Company Policy Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Job Location Dhaka Company Information Karnaphuli Group Follow More jobs from this company Address: 26/1, HR Bhaban, Kakrail, Dhaka-1000 Business: Established in 1954 and named after a river on whose banks the port city of Chittagong stands, Karnaphuli has with the ebb and flow of the past 65 years evolved and grown into a business house of diversified subsidiaries and activities. Its growth has been characterized by a single minded and dedicated pursuit of excellence and a professional urge to be the market leader in everything it is involved

Customer Care Representative (Real Estate Company) : Elegance Holdings Limited Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Elegance Holdings Limited Customer Care Representative (Real Estate Company) Application Deadline : 12 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 2 Age: 20 to 30 years Location: Dhaka (Banani) Salary: Tk. 17000 - 25000 (Monthly) Published: 02 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 20 to 30 years Responsibilities & Context Provide courteous and efficient customer service regarding all real estate products and services Make outbound calls to prospective property buyers and respond to inbound enquiries. Maintain strong client relationships through timely follow-up and personalized communication Assist clients in scheduling property showings and meetings with sales representatives Collaborate with clients to accelerate property sales and match them with suitable listings Support the full sales cycle, ensuring successful closure and delivery of property transactions Achieve monthly sales targets and meet assigned KPIs consistently Work under pressure with flexible hours in a collaborative team environment Skills & Expertise Communication in English CRM Software MS Office Sales Target Achievement Suggested by Client Service Customer Service Compensation & Other Benefits Mobile bill,Tour allowance Festival Bonus: 2 Opportunity for personal and professional development. Competitive remuneration package. Comprehensive sales commission benefit package on successful sales. Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka (Banani) Company Information Elegance Holdings Limited Follow Address: House-131, Road 4, Block A, Banani, Dhaka 1213, Bangladesh Website: www.eleganceholdingslimited.com Report this Job / Company (রিপোর্ট) রিপোর্ট এই চাকরির জন্য বিজ্ঞাপনদাতা ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠান আপনার কাছ থেকে কোন অর্থ চাইলে কিংবা নিয়োগ প্রক্রিয়া চলাকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানিমূলক (শারীরিক/মানসিক) আচরণ করলে অতিসত্ত্বর আমাদেরকে জানান অথবা জবটি রিপোর্ট করুন। চাকরি পাওয়ার জন্য কোন ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠানকে অর্থ প্রদান করবেন না। চাকরিকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানির (শারীরিক/মানসিক) সম্ভাবনা থাকলে সেখানে জয়েন করবেন না। কোন প্রকার অর্থ লেনদেন বা নিয়োগদাতা কর্তৃক হয়রানির দায়িত্ব বিডিজবস বহন করবে না। 09638666444 , 01897627858 complain@bdjobs.com ⏸ Internal auditor certificate course on ISO 14001:2015 Enviro... 3000 BDT Joyshree Das Register Now Internal Auditor certificate course on ISO 9001:2015 4000 BDT Joyshree Das Register Now Project Cycle Management (PCM) for the NGO Professionals 4500 BDT Tareq Ahmed Register Now Lean Six Sigma-Yellow Belt 3500 BDT Engr. Executive (Admin / Compliance) : Starlight Sweaters Ltd. Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Starlight Sweaters Ltd. Executive (Admin / Compliance) Application Deadline : 03 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 02 Age: 25 to 35 years Location: Gazipur (Gazipur Sadar) Salary: Tk. 25000 - 30000 (Monthly) Published: 04 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 25 to 35 years Only Male Should have sound knowledge on Labor Law & Rules and ILO convention relevant on Sweater sector in Bangladesh. Responsibilities & Context For Admin Executive: Housekeeping & Hygiene : Maintain the overall cleanliness of factory premises, including production floors, office areas, washrooms, and canteens. Security Management : Monitor security personnel, manage entry/exit rosters, and ensure all staff wear proper identification and uniforms. Logistics & Transport : Coordinate factory transport for staff and oversee the movement of goods, including waste (jhute) management. Canteen & Amenities : Supervise dining facilities to ensure food quality and hygiene standards are met for thousands of workers. Health & Safety (EHS) : Ensure fire safety, conduct regular evacuation drills, and monitor the usage of personal protective equipment (PPE). Legal Liaison : Coordinate with government agencies such as DIFE, the Labor Office, and local police for licenses and inspections. Discipline & Grievance : Handle employee disciplinary matters and grievances according to Bangladesh Labor Law and company policy. Recruitment Support : Assist in the hiring and onboarding process for factory workers and staff, including maintaining personal files. Procurement : Manage office supplies, fixed assets, and stationery inventory. Reporting : Prepare daily or monthly reports on administrative costs, wastage, and operational KPIs for senior management. Event Coordination : Organize internal company events, team-building activities, and guest entertainment for buyer visits. For Compliance Executive: Check all the registers which are being maintained on the floor if it`s properly maintained or not. Ensure Fire Fighter 6%, Rescuer 6% & First Aider 6% on each floor and update the list regularly. Ensure proper and safe housekeeping on the production floor, inform to housekeeping supervisor to ensure it, if any discrepancy observe. Ensure proper health & safety on the production floor for all employees. Ensure that all the electrical safety equipment is running smoothly, inform to the concerned person if any discrepancy observe. Ensure daily compliance activities on the production floor and follow this accordingly. Have clear knowledge on different audits BSCI, BETTERWORK, SEDEX, WRAP, HIGG etc. Recruitment will start

location: Dhaka, Dhaka (Dakshin Khan, Dhanmondi, Kakrail, Malibagh, Mohammadpur, Paltan, Tejgaon, Uttara Model Town)
